content: Hello! I'm Reese, a documentary filmmaker from Lisbon. I'm thinking of renovating my home office to make it more efficient. I spend most of my time editing films, and I need a better setup.
Lisbon is a beautiful city! What specific changes do you want to make to your home office? Are you looking to add more storage, improve the lighting, or something else?

I'd love to add more storage for my equipment and have a bigger desk. I'm also thinking of soundproofing the room, so I can focus on my work without distractions. My wife, Sofia, is always complaining about the noise, and I want to make her happy.

Soundproofing is a great idea! It can make a huge difference in your productivity. Have you considered using acoustic panels or adding mass to the walls? And how big is your current desk? Are you looking to upgrade to a specific size or style?

My current desk is about 5 feet long, but I'd like something bigger, maybe around 8 feet. And I've heard of acoustic panels, but I'm not sure where to start. I'll have to do some research. By the way, I'm planning to start the renovation on January 15th, so I can have it finished before my 62nd birthday in April.
